entity.name: Nick Hinz
entity.description: Solo developer building Bloom, a free and open-source mental health self-care app. No company, no investors, no monetization. Bloom will always be free.

projects.name: Bloom
projects.description: A free, open-source progressive web app for daily mental health self-care. Mood tracking, journaling with AI reflections, breathing exercises, habit building, peer encouragement. All data stays on-device. Built for people who are going through it and need a quiet place to show up for themselves.

plans.name: One-time donation
plans.description: Any amount helps keep Bloom free. Even a few dollars covers AI costs for dozens of users.

plans.name: Monthly supporter
plans.description: Covers Bloom's AI reflection costs for approximately 50 users per month.

plans.name: Infrastructure sponsor
plans.description: Covers API costs, domain, and infrastructure for hundreds of daily active users.

history.description: Domain registration ($14/yr), Anthropic API costs (~$3-5/mo at current usage). All other infrastructure on free tiers.
